P

Profile - Class in com.example.vigilante
This class is what creates a profile for a user.
Profile() - Constructor for class com.example.vigilante.Profile
 
Profile(String, String, String, String, String, Boolean) - Constructor for class com.example.vigilante.Profile
This function takes all the necessary arguments required to create a user
ProfileAdapter - Class in com.example.vigilante
This class is the engine function for the profiles, it grabs the profiles from firebase and views it to the user
ProfileAdapter(List<Profile>, boolean, String) - Constructor for class com.example.vigilante.ProfileAdapter
 
ProfileAdapter.ProfileViewHolder - Class in com.example.vigilante
This function holds the profiles in the recylerview and shows it to the user.
ProfilePage - Class in com.example.vigilante
This class is for the profile page it shows the user information, sign out button, and if user is organizer add and my events.
ProfilePage() - Constructor for class com.example.vigilante.ProfilePage
 
ProfileViewHolder(View) - Constructor for class com.example.vigilante.ProfileAdapter.ProfileViewHolder
